title: Collection rates for Council Tax and non-domestic rates in England, 2023 to 2024
body: "This release provides information on the collection rates and the receipts of Council Tax and non-domestic rates by local authorities for the financial year 1 April 2023 to 31 March 2024.  View live tables showing quarterly receipts of both Council Tax and non-domestic rates and numbers of local Council Tax support claimants at local authority level. "
